title: Cosmos SDK tendermint.types.Data Schemas
description: JSON Schema definitions for the tendermint.types.Data module of the Cosmos SDK gRPC-gateway REST API.

txs.description:
Txs that will be applied by state @ block.Height+1.
NOTE: not all txs here are valid.  We're just agreeing on the order first.
This means that block.AppHash does not include these txs.

tendermint.types.Data.title: Data contains the set of transactions included in the block
